# SundAI

SundAI is an AI and cybersecurity advisory studio operated by Riimon Holdings LTD.

Core services:
- AI adoption and strategy
- AI governance and compliance
- AI security and organisational risk
- Secure automation and AI assistants
- Workshops and organisational enablement

Official website: https://sundaibot.com/
English: https://sundaibot.com/
Danish: https://sundaibot.com/da/
Swedish: https://sundaibot.com/sv/
